```python
def solve():
    # This function is for internal use to generate the answers.
    # It will not be part of the final output.
    
    # Mapping from letter to index
    letter_to_index = {chr(ord('A') + i): i for i in range(26)}
    
    # Mapping from index to letter
    index_to_letter = {i: chr(ord('A') + i) for i in range(26)}
    
    def transform_char(c):
        # Map character to index x
        x = letter_to_index[c]
        # Compute y = (5*x + 13) mod 26
        y = (5 * x + 13) % 26
        # Map index y back to a character
        return index_to_letter[y]
        
    def transform_string(s):
        return "".join(transform_char(c) for c in s)

    inputs = [
        "JD",
        "PL",
        "YZ",
        "AI",
        "YB",
        "KZ",
        "BO",
        "EV",
        "CG",
        "TZ"
    ]
    
    answers = [transform_string(s) for s in inputs]
    return answers

# The generated answers are:
# (1) JD -> J=9 -> (5*9+13)%26=58%26=6->G; D=3 -> (5*3+13)%26=28%26=2->C => GC
# (2) PL -> P=15 -> (5*15+13)%26=88%26=10->K; L=11 -> (5*11+13)%26=68%26=16->Q => KQ
# (3) YZ -> Y=24 -> (5*24+13)%26=133%26=3->D; Z=25 -> (5*25+13)%26=138%26=8->I => DI
# (4) AI -> A=0 -> (5*0+13)%26=13->N; I=8 -> (5*8+13)%26=53%26=1->B => NB
# (5) YB -> Y=24 -> (5*24+13)%26=133%26=3->D; B=1 -> (5*1+13)%26=18->S => DS
# (6) KZ -> K=10 -> (5*10+13)%26=63%26=11->L; Z=25 -> (5*25+13)%26=138%26=8->I => LI
# (7) BO -> B=1 -> (5*1+13)%26=18->S; O=14 -> (5*14+13)%26=83%26=5->F => SF
# (8) EV -> E=4 -> (5*4+13)%26=33%26=7->H; V=21 -> (5*21+13)%26=118%26=14->O => HO
# (9) CG -> C=2 -> (5*2+13)%26=23->X; G=6 -> (5*6+13)%26=43%26=17->R => XR
# (10) TZ -> T=19 -> (5*19+13)%26=108%26=4->E; Z=25 -> (5*25+13)%26=138%26=8->I => EI
```
